steps.title: Use the marketing clue
steps.content: The sentence says a well-executed marketing campaign helped make a novel commercially successful. A marketing campaign creates public attention and promotion, so the blank must name that kind of support.

steps.title: Reject unrelated traits
steps.content: A names novelty, C names intricacy, and D names usefulness. None is what a marketing campaign creates. The word that fits is public attention generated by promotion. The answer is B.
